mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, author_id, author_name, content, created_at, parent_id, is_deleted FROM vibe.board_comment WHERE board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.board_comment (id, board_id, author_id, author_name, content, created_at, parent_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{boardId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.board_comment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
